svg.text: Da Vinci CRD + DTR + PAS | Google ADK + Gemini 2.5 Flash | FHIR R4 | GCP Healthcare API
Reads context, selects next tool, passes outputs forward -- 5 call_llm cycles per run
Da Vinci CRD | CDS Hooks order-sign hook | Reads Coverage from FHIR, POSTs to payer CRD endpoint
Returns: status (PA_REQUIRED / PA_NOT_REQUIRED / UNKNOWN), coverage_fhir_id, payer_id
Da Vinci DTR | Firestore cache (24h TTL) -> payer DTR endpoint -> local template fallback
Returns: questionnaire_id, item_count, items list, _source indicator
Gemini fills questionnaire using FHIR $everything | Citation validator checks all cited resource IDs
Hallucinated IDs downgraded to LOW confidence | MISSING required answers block submission
Builds Da Vinci PAS FHIR transaction bundle (PAS IG v2.1.0 entry order enforced)
Cloud DLP inspection -- HIGH likelihood PHI blocks assembly | WARN-only for expected PHI
POSTs PAS bundle to payer $submit | Parses ClaimResponse | Writes to FHIR (status=draft)
Publishes decision to Pub/Sub | Stores submission state in Firestore for async polling
Payer (External) -- BCBS California (bcbs-ca-001) -- Da Vinci FHIR Endpoints
Missing required answers -- clinician completes documentation and reruns agent
PA denied -- clinician review for appeal, Task contains denial reason
PA pended -- care team provides payer-requested items, Task lists each item
DLP block (urgent) -- staff review bundle for unexpected PHI before resubmit
CMS window exceeded (urgent) -- escalate to payer relations
Scheduling system -- schedules CGM device provisioning on APPROVED decision
EHR integration -- surfaces auth number in Epic ordering workflow
Care coordination -- notifies care manager of denial for appeal initiation
CDI Agent (Agent 5) -- reviews documentation gaps that may have contributed to denial
Patient notification -- triggers patient communication for approved PA
ADK Prior Authorization Agent | Portfolio Project 2 of 9 | Healthcare Agentic AI Series
